overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hooded protagonist carrying a lit torch walking through a foggy, dark landscape. The character travels along a dirt path lined with wooden fence posts, approaching and walking onto a wooden dock extending into a misty body of water where a dog stands waiting.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy coastal dirt path with wooden fence posts

events.description: body of water becomes visible through the fog in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path holding a torch, approaching the waterfront through the fog

narrow dirt trail winding through the grass
tall brownish grass covering the field

wooden pier structure extending into the water ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy dirt path bordered by wooden fence posts, surrounded by tall grass fields. The torch illuminates the immediate area as the character approaches a misty body of water, with a wooden dock becoming visible in the distance and a rocky cliff on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock extending over misty water

events.description: character steps from dirt path onto the wooden dock over the water
character passes a dog standing on the dock near the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walking onto the wooden dock extending over the water, torchlight reflecting off the planks

notable_agents.action: dog standing on the dock looking out toward the water

entered.detail: wooden fishing structure with nets extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a weathered wooden dock extending into the misty water, leaving the dirt path behind. A dog stands near the entrance of the dock looking out at the water. The torchlight reflects off the wooden planks as the character walks toward the end of the pier, surrounded by fog and water with distant shores barely visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy inland path toward a weathered wooden dock extending into a misty body of water. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path bordered by wooden fence posts and tall grass, with a lit torch illuminating the immediate surroundings against a backdrop of a rocky cliff. As the character approaches the water's edge, the scene shifts from the grassy terrain onto the wooden planks of a pier. The camera then follows the character past a waiting dog at the dock's entrance, with the torchlight reflecting off the weathered wood. Finally, the movement continues toward the end of the pier, surrounded by dense fog and water with distant shores barely visible in the haze.
